subject: Quick question from a fellow UNC student
body: Hi Jane, I am a junior at Kenan-Flagler recruiting for IB. Saw you went through the same program. Could I ask you one specific question about the SA timeline?
why_it_worked: Specific single ask, shared UNC tie, respected their time

body: Hi, I would love to pick your brain about consulting recruiting, do you have 30 minutes this week?
why_it_worked: Vague ask, asked for too much time, no shared hook

subject: Following up on your panel last week
body: Thanks for speaking at the finance panel. Your point on coverage groups stuck with me. One question: how did you decide between groups?
why_it_worked: Referenced a real shared moment, concrete question
